creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dbaio
Date: Thu Jun  7 14:18:56 UTC 2018
New revision: 471924
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/471924

Log:
  Add dns/go-geodns: DNS server with per-client targeted responses

  GeoDNS is a DNS server with per-client targeted responses. It powers the NTP
  Pool system and other similar services.

  WWW: https://github.com/abh/geodns

  PR:		227492
  Submitted by:	Vinicius Zavam <egypcio@googlemail.com>
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D15056

Changes:
  head/GIDs
  head/UIDs
  head/dns/Makefile
  head/dns/go-geodns/
  head/dns/go-geodns/Makefile
  head/dns/go-geodns/distinfo
  head/dns/go-geodns/files/
  head/dns/go-geodns/files/geodns.in
  head/dns/go-geodns/files/pkg-message.in
  head/dns/go-geodns/pkg-descr
  head/dns/go-geodns/pkg-plist
